note: Deterministic story-seed templates. Composed from three fragment tables keyed by Expression / Soul Urge / Personality (digits 1–9). The full triplet space (9×9×9 = 729) is generated by composition rather than enumerated. Output is an archetypal pattern, not a personal biography. Living Profile is where the user's lived story lives.

expression.1: You arrive in any room as a beginning — the one who opens a way that was not yet there.
expression.2: You arrive as a thread that connects — the one who feels where the weave wants to close.
expression.3: You arrive as a voice — the one who turns inner light into colour and sound.
expression.4: You arrive as a builder — the one who places stone where stone must go.
expression.5: You arrive as motion — the one who refuses to let the field forget that it can change.
expression.6: You arrive as care — the one who tends the place others sit down in.
expression.7: You arrive as a listener of the deep kind — the one who reads beneath the surface text.
expression.8: You arrive as steadiness at scale — the one who can be answerable for large weight.
expression.9: You arrive as a completer — the one who carries endings with grace.
expression.11: You arrive as a tuned instrument — the one whose frequency reorders the air.
expression.22: You arrive as a master builder — the one who brings vision all the way down to form.
expression.33: You arrive as devotion — the one whose teaching is the way they live.

soul_urge.1: Inwardly you long to begin things, to taste the first step before anyone else.
soul_urge.2: Inwardly you long for the steady company of one or two true others.
soul_urge.3: Inwardly you long for the work and the play to be the same thing.
soul_urge.4: Inwardly you long to make something that lasts past your hands.
soul_urge.5: Inwardly you long for a horizon wider than the one in front of you.
soul_urge.6: Inwardly you long for a home that is also a hearth for others.
soul_urge.7: Inwardly you long for silence that makes meaning audible.
soul_urge.8: Inwardly you long to be entrusted with weight and to carry it well.
soul_urge.9: Inwardly you long to leave the field gentler than you found it.
soul_urge.11: Inwardly you long for the high signal to clarify into a daily life.
soul_urge.22: Inwardly you long for the impossible thing to become buildable.
soul_urge.33: Inwardly you long to love at the scale your life is asking for.

personality.1: On the outside you read as someone who moves first — a forward edge.
personality.2: On the outside you read as someone people open up to without quite knowing why.
personality.3: On the outside you read as colour and warmth, an invitation in human form.
personality.4: On the outside you read as someone reliable, plain-spoken, present.
personality.5: On the outside you read as restless light — never quite finished with the room.
personality.6: On the outside you read as someone who carries the small near things tenderly.
personality.7: On the outside you read as a quiet centre — a stillness others can rest near.
personality.8: On the outside you read as authority worn lightly — the long view.
personality.9: On the outside you read as someone whose ending is also a kind of blessing.
personality.11: On the outside you read as luminous attention — a signal that something is being seen.
personality.22: On the outside you read as someone whose vision is already half-built.
personality.33: On the outside you read as a kept fire — quiet, steady, devotional.
